top3.sql:
WITH prev_year_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    ss_item_sk,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS prev_year_sales_amt
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year = 2000 AND d_moy = 12
  GROUP BY ss_item_sk
),
curr_year_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    ss_item_sk,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS curr_year_sales_amt
  FROM store_sales
  JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 12
  GROUP BY ss_item_sk
)
SELECT 
  i_item_sk,
  i_item_id,
  i_item_d...
